About

Builder. Investor. Operator.

I build companies from zero — and scale them to $30M+. I've pioneered NFT payment infrastructure, deployed patented print-on-demand technology across four continents, and assembled executive teams drawing from Amazon, Google, Apple, Microsoft, Uber, PayPal, Salesforce, Oracle, Walmart, Airbnb, eBay, Stanford, and MIT.

Stanford StartX alum. Alchemist Accelerator mentor and lecturer. Named Mr. Silicon Valley. Raised more money for HackCancer in under 2.5 weeks than anyone had in 5+ years — breaking the all-time fundraising record. Accepted to West Point with a Congressional Nomination — turned it down to tour with a rock band and run a record label.

Now building AI-powered revenue systems for physical businesses — starting with longevity clinics. The same frameworks that scaled my companies are being automated for operators who don't have time to build them from scratch.
